textByHash.35c7c9033cb0874dbaa9ec1063319430fddd3ba4: Feel free to have a read through the books here. Now that the city is open to visitors, we've had lots of new additions from far and wide.
textByHash.88c87171e0e512cfe558d06519949dda0e4d4c98: Hello there. Welcome to the Grand Library.
textByHash.903a0ddc6a943ed7f5c77c5f27eaa9974630f108: That said, we still want visitors to get a taste of what the library has to offer. For that reason, we've opened up this small section of it.
textByHash.dea5605a5f09f4b1bee94ba79ae62e413dabe529: Oh it is. While we've opened up the city to other races, we've decided that most of the library will remain a place for elves only.
